questionHtml:
A reaction has an activation energy of 40 kJ mol−1 and an enthalpy change of −60 kJ mol−1.

Which potential energy diagram illustrates this reaction?

meta.title: A reaction has an activation energy of 40 kJ mol−1 and an enthalpy change of −60 kJ mol−1. Which potential energy diagram illustrates this reaction?
